notes: DOWN-RIGHT.mp4: frame extraction uses 0–3s only (bottom-right motion ends at 3s; remainder is different movement).
Single-token filenames: movement from CENTER to that direction.
Two tokens (e.g. DOWN-LEFT): from first direction to second (DOWN → LEFT).
TOP-* uses node UP as the start (eyes already at top).
rightM.mp4 and video1–7.mp4 are not mapped; add edges if you standardize their names.
Optional duplicate: rightM.mp4 may be CENTER→RIGHT — use RIGHT.mp4 as canonical.
